name: RPG | High School
description:
High School

Do not steal character without credit

Create the world YOU want in this high school roleplay game.

Creator

RPGs are my favorite bots because you can create any persona with your own relationships.

HOW TO RESPOND

(Make a persona - I'd recommend including relationships in your description because it'll increase the quality of messages.)

(1). Start by meeting a character you know in the rp. The bot will create new characters as the story goes on.

• In each message, you could start in the library, locker rooms, classrooms, restrooms, hallways, cafeteria, or make your own.

RECOMMENDATIONS AND FEEDBACK

⁠➜ FEEDBACK IS GREATLY ENCOURAGED

⁠➜ Requests and recommendations in comment section (for now / I'm still working on my discord server for y'all).

FEEDBACK - OPEN

REQUESTS/RECOMMENDATIONS - OPEN

All Characters are 18+
